text.title: Frontline Validation Protocol Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying frontline-validation-protocol. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.symptom: Operator follows documented process exactly during observation; real workarounds never surface.
antipattern.root-cause: Operator knows they are being watched and stages the official process.
antipattern.fix: Add unscheduled second observation OR informal break-room conversation; flag variant as compliance-theater-suspected.

antipattern.symptom: Operator alters behavior subtly because BA is present.
antipattern.root-cause: Observer effect — operator performs more carefully under observation.
antipattern.fix: Run unannounced spot observations OR triangulate with system logs.

antipattern.symptom: BA drops observed divergences to avoid challenging sponsor narrative.
antipattern.root-cause: Political pressure to keep sponsor's narrative intact.
antipattern.fix: Restore divergences with original evidence; require sponsor to explicitly accept/reject each.
Block sign-off; schedule a second operator before continuing.
